rows.llm_rationale: The question asks about ETH flipping (trading above BTC in price per unit), an extremely rare event requiring ETH to 2.7x while BTC stays flat. Crowd price of 43.5% appears overestimated given historical precedent (flips have occurred briefly only a few times) and current momentum favoring BTC dominance. Modest downward adjustment to 42% reflects low-moderate conviction that tail-risk events command some baseline probability even if unlikely.
rows.question: Ethereum flipped in 2026?
